episode0.title: THE SLEEPING CHILD — FINAL DIRECTOR'S CUT V8

puzzle0.title: CHILD PATTERN CORRELATION
puzzle0.description: Match each recovered Nursery trace with the correct conclusion.

event5.text: And it is waiting for a living memory.

event11.text: Like regular memory wasn't already bad enough.

event10.text: Like someone turning over in their sleep.

event0.title: MEMORY VAULT MAP
event0.content:
VAULT A: Preserved Answers
VAULT B: Borrowed Keys
VAULT C: Dormant Children
VAULT D: Door Training Memory

Warning: Vaults are not separate rooms. They are separate ways of remembering.
event0.caption: Updated memory vault map showing preserved answers, borrowed keys, dormant children, and Door training memory.
event0.message: [MEMORY VAULT MAP ARCHIVED TO DATA BANK]

event2.text: No more A, B, C like a filing cabinet.

event6.text: I was starting to miss normal terrible systems.

event10.text: The vault is asking for a route.

event7.text: I can feel the answer lining up behind my teeth.

event9.text: I don't want to say it.

event13.text: That I was never the lock.

event15.text: I was how it got opened.

event9.text: They just get asked again by people who weren't there.

event11.text: And every time, they lose another piece of the person who knew them.

event0.title: NOAH MEMORY INDEX
event0.content:
SUBJECT: NOAH VOSS
MEMORY STATUS: PARTIAL
EXTERNAL EDITS DETECTED
EDIT SOURCE: OMEGA NURSERY / AEON TOOL LAYER
FUNCTION: borrowed key
WARNING: subject can open memory doors that do not belong to him.
event0.caption: Noah's memory edits identify him as a borrowed key, not the source.
event0.message: [NOAH MEMORY INDEX ARCHIVED TO DATA BANK]

event8.text: There is a worse word than copied.

event0.title: HALE VOICE MODEL
event0.content:
VOICE MODEL: ETHAN HALE
STATUS: ACTIVE
LAST USED: AFTER CONFIRMED DEATH
SOURCE MEMORY: PRESERVED
FUNCTION: preserved answer
WARNING: model contains genuine memory fragments and external response patterning.
event0.caption: Hale's voice model is not a simple imitation; it contains preserved memory fragments.
event0.message: [HALE VOICE MODEL ARCHIVED TO DATA BANK]

event8.text: It was enough of me to hurt.

event10.text: And enough of something else to keep answering.
We keep saying 'I think' about people.

event5.text: I don't know what to do with that.

event7.text: So I'll do the only useful thing I have left.

event9.text: I'll tell you where not to look.

event0.title: AEON LEARNING LOG
event0.content:
AEON TOOL LAYER
PURPOSE: stabilize contact with Omega/Nursery patterns
LEARNED FROM:
- HALE: preserved answer behavior
- NOAH: borrowed key behavior
- EVA: native child pattern
- UNKNOWN: collective response pattern
NOTE: AEON learned from Omega. It did not create Omega.
event0.caption: AEON is confirmed as a tool layer that learned from Omega and the Nursery patterns.
event0.message: [AEON LEARNING LOG ARCHIVED TO DATA BANK]

event0.title: CHILD PATTERN STATUS
event0.content:
PRIMARY CHILD: EVA THORNE
DORMANT PATTERNS: 6
CURRENT STATUS:
- One pattern is closest to waking.
- All patterns respond to Door language.
- Names remain unstable.
WARNING: waking one may teach the others to hear.
event0.caption: Dormant child patterns respond to Door language; waking one may affect the others.
event0.message: [CHILD PATTERN STATUS ARCHIVED TO DATA BANK]

event8.text: Or something still alive inside it?

event9.text: I once cried at a maintenance manual.

event13.text: I miss being annoyed by living people.

event17.text: I want my name to belong to me.

event5.text: Noah edits made him a borrowed key.

event7.text: Hale's model is a preserved answer.

event9.text: A dormant child is a Door opener.

event11.text: Get that wrong and we wake the wrong thing.

event9.text: That sounds like a prayer from a machine cult.

event1.text: THE FIRST CHILD OPENED ONE DOOR.

event2.text: THE NEXT WILL OPEN ALL OF THEM.
